title: bind9.16 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[32:9.16.23-0.22.4]
- Prevent cache poisoning due to weak PRNG (CVE-2025-40780)
- Address various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778)
- Replace downstream fixes with upstream changes

[32:9.16.23-0.22.3]
- Update addresses of b.root-servers.net (RHEL-18449)
full_text:
[32:9.16.23-0.22.4]
- Prevent cache poisoning due to weak PRNG (CVE-2025-40780)
- Address various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778)
- Replace downstream fixes with upstream changes

[32:9.16.23-0.22.3]
- Update addresses of b.root-servers.net (RHEL-18449)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-19793.html
